mission.title: Install and Configure Kairos on Kubernetes
mission.description: Kairos is an immutable Linux meta-distribution designed for edge Kubernetes, enabling the creation of bootable Kubernetes and OS images for edge devices. Installing Kairos allows you to manage cluster lifecycle seamlessly and securely, ensuring no infrastructure drift.

steps.title: Download Kairos ISO
steps.description:
Download the Kairos ISO for your preferred base OS:
```bash
# Ubuntu-based
curl -Lo kairos.iso https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v3.3.3/kairos-ubuntu-24.04-standard-amd64-generic-v3.3.3.iso

# Or Alpine-based (smaller)
curl -Lo kairos.iso https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v3.3.3/kairos-alpine-3.21-standard-amd64-generic-v3.3.3.iso
```
See all flavors at https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases

steps.title: Boot and install
steps.description:
Boot the ISO on your edge device (USB, PXE, or VM). The interactive installer will guide you through:
- Network configuration
- K3s/K8s installation
- User setup

Or use a cloud-config file for automated installation:
```yaml
#cloud-config
install:
  auto: true
  device: /dev/sda
k3s:
  enabled: true
users:
  - name: kairos
    passwd: kairos
```

steps.title: Verify the Kubernetes cluster
steps.description:
After installation, SSH into the node:
```bash
ssh kairos@<node-ip>
sudo k3s kubectl get nodes
sudo k3s kubectl get pods -A
```

steps.title: Install the Kairos CLI (optional)
steps.description:
The Kairos CLI helps manage nodes:
```bash
curl -Lo kairos-cli https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v3.3.3/kairos-cli-linux-amd64
chmod +x kairos-cli
sudo mv kairos-cli /usr/local/bin/kairos
kairos version
```

resolution.summary: Kairos is installed as an immutable Linux OS with Kubernetes (K3s) for edge computing with atomic upgrades.

uninstall.title: Reinstall the OS
uninstall.description: Kairos is an immutable OS — to remove it, reinstall a different OS on the device.

upgrade.title: Upgrade via container image
upgrade.description:
Kairos upgrades atomically via OCI images:
```bash
sudo kairos upgrade --image quay.io/kairos/ubuntu:v3.3.3
```
The system will reboot into the new version with A/B rollback support.

troubleshooting.title: Node fails to boot after install
troubleshooting.description: Check the install logs in `/var/log/kairos/` and ensure the target disk is correct.

troubleshooting.title: K3s not starting
troubleshooting.description:
Check the K3s service:
```bash
sudo systemctl status k3s
sudo journalctl -u k3s
```

troubleshooting.title: P2P mesh not forming
troubleshooting.description: Kairos P2P mesh requires UDP port 51820 (WireGuard) to be open between nodes.

prerequisites.description: Physical or virtual machine for the immutable OS. Kairos includes K3s for Kubernetes.
